titleStmt.title: SII 4.1324: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1324. (A.R. No. 402 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cālukyavaṁśatilakasya parāṁtakasya sēnādhipō dvijapatissuja
nastutōyaṁ . bhīmēśvarāya sukṛtārtthatayā svamāturācaṁdratārakamakha
ṇḍamadātpradīpaṁ [. 1*] śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1034 svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpritivalla
bha mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēsvara paramabhaṭṭāraka ravikulatilaka cōḍakulasēkhara
pāṇḍyakulāṁtaka samastarājāsraya rājarājēṁdra vīramahēṁdra vikramacōḍa vijayābhara
ṇa rājakēsarivarmma permmānaḍigalu gaṁggākāvērīparyyaṁta saptamōviṣṇuvarddhanu
laina tribhuvanacakravartti śrīkulōttuṁggacōḍadēvara pravarddhamānavijayarā
jyasaṁvatsa 43 śrahi dina 230 ṇḍa nuttarāyanasaṁkrāṁtinimityamunaṁ peddalapā
kuyaḍapa jannayayaina śrīparāṁtakabrahmādhirāyaru śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvara
kuṁ beṭṭina yakhaṇḍavartti lōhadaṇḍudiviya 1 ṇḍu . dīniki nācaṁdrarkkamu neyu sari
yiṁccuvārugā śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvara kilaramuna prōlabōla nāvayayu
peddibhōla nāvayayu meṁṭabōla Eṟiyanayuṁ dalarāsi nāvaya berasina
bōlu nalvuruṁ būṁṭagā meṁṭana Eṟiyani Aḍapuna kommabōla jakkani vasamu
naṁ beṭṭina InpaEḍlu 50 di . dina 1 kiṁ golavaṁgala tribhu
likhītaṁ ḍākarēmi pedana
Digital edition of SII 4.1324 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
